label: Cost list for difficulty
description: A conditional cost list and stuff count that applies when a named difficulty variable matches.

difficultyVar.label: Difficulty var
difficultyVar.description: Name of the difficulty variable evaluated to decide whether this cost list applies.

costList.label: Cost list
costList.description: Materials consumed when this difficulty-conditional cost applies. Child element names are ThingDef defNames.

costStuffCount.label: Cost stuff count
costStuffCount.description: Amount of stuff required when this difficulty-conditional cost applies.

invert.label: Invert
invert.description: If true, the cost list applies when the difficulty variable does NOT match rather than when it does.
